description_long: This is a two-story modern bungalow with a flat roof and a geometric, streamlined design. The exterior features a combination of light gray and muted pink wall panels, accented by beige and dark trim along the edges and columns. Large, angular windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, with a prominent bay window on one side and a small balcony with railings on the upper floor. The main entrance is recessed beneath a covered porch supported by sturdy columns. Roof details include multiple rectangular vents and skylights, as well as a rooftop utility box. The overall structure is boxy and compact, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large angular windows, muted pink and gray walls, and a small balcony. The design is geometric and streamlined, with minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance beneath a covered porch, a balcony with railings above, and large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, rooftop vents, and a mix of window shapes, including a prominent bay window.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the bay window, additional windows, and the compact, boxy structure.
description_view_3: Back view featuring the bay window, balcony, and a clear view of the two-story layout with asymmetrical window placement.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with bay window and balcony window
